case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. YUVRAJ GILL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,787.56 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GILL, YUVRAJ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILLEF. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYON HOWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILLEF. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-24-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-13-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION RE: REST OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GILL, YUVRAJ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED NOV-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILL, YUVRAJ
